MYRKUL.ModuleDescription: A soul-tracking system for Paladins who have made a pact with Myrkul

PactActorId.Name: Pact-Bound Actor
PactActorId.Hint: The actor who has made the pact with Myrkul

KillDetectionMode.Name: Kill Detection Mode
KillDetectionMode.Hint: How to detect when souls should be claimed

AnnounceClaims.Name: Announce Soul Claims
AnnounceClaims.Hint: Who should see soul claim messages

FXPreset.Name: Visual Effects Preset
FXPreset.Hint: Style of visual effects to use

darkBoon.Name: Dark Boon
darkBoon.Description: Gain temporary hit points equal to your Paladin level
darkBoon.Applied: {actorName} draws upon dark power, gaining {tempHP} temporary hit points
darkBoon.Notification: You gain {tempHP} temporary hit points from Myrkul's dark blessing
darkBoon.Tooltip: Spend 1 Soul Fragment to gain temp HP equal to Paladin level

whispers.Name: Whispers of Death
whispers.Description: Your next weapon attack deals an additional 1d4 necrotic damage
whispers.Applied: {actorName}'s weapon is shrouded in deathly whispers
whispers.Notification: Your next attack will deal additional necrotic damage
whispers.Tooltip: Spend 1 Soul Fragment to add 1d4 necrotic damage to your next attack

focus.Name: Reaper's Focus
focus.Description: Gain advantage on your next saving throw against fear, charm, or necrotic damage
focus.Applied: {actorName} is shielded by the Reaper's unwavering focus
focus.Notification: You have advantage on saves against fear, charm, and necrotic damage
focus.Tooltip: Spend 1 Soul Fragment for advantage on saves vs fear, charm, or necrotic

Burden.Success: {actorName} resists the burden of souls (rolled {roll} vs DC {dc})
Burden.Failure: {actorName} succumbs to the burden of souls (rolled {roll} vs DC {dc})
Burden.CriticalFailure: {actorName} is overwhelmed by the burden of souls! (rolled {roll} vs DC {dc})

SocialDisadvantage.Name: Burden of Souls
SocialDisadvantage.Description: The weight of claimed souls makes social interaction difficult

Base.1: The souls whisper of their former lives, urging you to remember their names...
Base.2: You feel the cold touch of the grave upon your shoulder...
Base.3: Myrkul's presence grows stronger with each soul you claim...
Base.4: The line between life and death blurs in your vision...
Base.5: You hear the distant tolling of funeral bells...

Intense.1: The souls SCREAM for release, their voices drowning out your thoughts!
Intense.2: Myrkul's icy grip tightens around your heart, claiming more of your humanity!
Intense.3: You see the faces of the dead in every shadow, their eyes accusing!
Intense.4: Death calls to you with increasing urgency - will you answer?

Chat.SoulOverflow: {actorName} attempts to claim {targetName}'s soul, but it slips away coldly. The vessel is full. ({souls}/{cap})

Commands.Help:
Myrkul's Claim Commands

!soul add [n] - Add souls (default 1)
!soul spend <type> - Spend soul for boon (boon/whispers/focus)
!soul set <n> - Set soul count
!soul clear - Clear all souls
!soul report - Show current status

Effects.SoulClaimed: A soul has been claimed from {target}
Effects.BurdenNormal: The burden of souls weighs heavy
Effects.BurdenCritical: The burden of souls is overwhelming!

Errors.NoPactActor: No pact actor has been configured
Errors.PactNotEnabled: The pact is not currently enabled for this actor
Errors.NoPermission: You do not have permission to modify souls
Errors.GMOnly: This action is only available to the GM
Errors.NoSouls: No soul fragments available to spend

ClearSouls.Title: Clear Souls
ClearSouls.Content: Are you sure you want to clear all soul fragments? This cannot be undone.

ResetPact.Title: Reset Pact
ResetPact.Content: Are you sure you want to completely reset the pact? This will clear all souls, corruption, and effects. This cannot be undone.

Tooltips.SoulCounter: Right-click for options. Current soul fragments and capacity.
Tooltips.Corruption: Total souls ever claimed. Click for corruption details.
Tooltips.EnabledToggle: Enable or disable the pact with Myrkul

Corruption.Description: Corruption represents the total number of souls ever claimed through your pact with Myrkul. Higher corruption may lead to more frequent and intense burden effects.
Corruption.Warning: ⚠️ Your corruption level is affecting your character's behavior and mental state.
Corruption.Threshold10: 10+ - More frequent whispers and social difficulties
Corruption.Threshold25: 25+ - Significant mental strain and supernatural awareness
Corruption.Threshold50: 50+ - Overwhelming influence of death and the undead
